zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：区间震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL处于窄幅震荡结构中，价格围绕68.5至69.1区间反复运行，整体缺乏明确方向。短期走势略偏弱，未能有效站上69关口上方，市场动能呈现收敛状态，属于典型的整理蓄势阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD持续处于负值区间，显示空头动能仍占主导，但下行动能并未显著放大，说明抛压有限。价格持续运行在20日均线69.36下方，均线形成短期压制，趋势结构偏弱。

支撑位方面，68.5为当前关键短线支撑，一旦失守可能回撤至68整数关口寻求承接。上方阻力首先关注69.1，进一步强阻力位于69.36均线及70整数关口，突破需放量配合。

交易策略上建议以区间思路为主，高抛低吸更为稳妥。靠近68.5附近可关注短线反弹机会，而接近69.1至69.3区域宜考虑减仓。若放量突破69.4，则可转为顺势做多思路。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is trading at 68.78, slightly below its 20-day simple moving average of 69.36, indicating a mild short-term bearish bias. Price action has been compressed within a narrow intraday range between 68.50 and 69.08, suggesting reduced volatility and a market waiting for a catalyst. The flat 24-hour change reinforces the idea of consolidation rather than a decisive trend, with buyers and sellers currently balanced around the 69.00 area.

The MACD reading of -0.2876 points to weakening momentum and hints that bearish pressure still has a modest advantage. Although RSI data is unavailable, the inability to reclaim the SMA(20) implies that upside momentum remains limited. If price continues to trade below 69.36, short-term traders may interpret rallies as opportunities to reduce exposure or initiate cautious bearish positions.

From a technical perspective, immediate support lies near 68.50, the recent session low. A break below this level could expose the market to a deeper retracement toward the psychological 68.00 zone and potentially 67.20 thereafter. On the upside, resistance is emerging around 69.10, followed by the SMA region near 69.35-69.40. A sustained move above these levels would improve sentiment and could open the path toward the 70.00 mark.

Traders may consider maintaining a neutral-to-cautious stance until a breakout develops. Aggressive participants could look for short-term buying opportunities near support with tight risk controls, while momentum traders may prefer waiting for a confirmed close above 69.40 before targeting higher levels. Conversely, a decisive break beneath 68.50 would favor defensive positioning and could signal the beginning of another downward leg in the near term.
